hero.headline: Modern roster construction for today's D1 programs.
hero.intro: We go beyond the portal to offer modern D1 programs two data-informed services built for today's roster construction landscape — where high school recruiting alone no longer gets it done.

services.title: Transfer Portal NIL Valuation
services.body: Signing the wrong player at the wrong price is one of the costliest mistakes a program can make. Our context-based NIL valuation model generates clear, defensible numbers before you ever make an offer, analyzing player performance data, portal history, and comparable deals to reflect what a player is truly worth to your program.
bullets: Negotiate smarter, allocate better, and never overpay again.

services.title: International Player Matching
services.body: The right fit might not be in the portal at all. Coaches submit their needs — position, role, statistical benchmarks, culture fit, and target NIL package — and our global agent network goes to work. What comes back is a curated shortlist with film, a full scouting report, agent context, and direct contact information so you can act immediately.
bullets: Agents also provide academic context on each prospect, including academic standing and expected graduation timeline, giving you a meaningful head start on due diligence.

cta.title: Try It Free
cta.body: Experience a NIL valuation or receive an international shortlist before making any commitment. No pressure, no obligation.

closing.title: Built for the Modern D1 Coach
closing.body: Beyond the Portal gives coaches the valuation tools and global scouting relationships to build rosters with precision and a genuine competitive edge.

team.name: Enaam Maqsood
team.bio: Player evaluator specializing in transfer portal and international prospects, with hands-on D1 experience building valuation frameworks at the intersection of film study, data, and NIL-era roster construction.

team.name: Alex Lui
team.bio: Computer scientist with a passion for leveraging technology to solve real-world problems in the sports industry.
